channel.title: ARX — Market Insights & Trading Analysis
channel.description: Insights on DeFi copy trading, market regime detection, wallet intelligence, and Hyperliquid. Stay ahead with ARX.

item.title: Nasdaq Up 11 Straight. Crypto Perp Traders Are Doubling Down on Shorts.
item.description: The Nasdaq has recovered sharply — 11 consecutive up sessions off the early-April lows, with the S&P 500 back at multi-week highs. Crypto isn't following. BTC sits at $74,574, barely changed (+0.11% in 24h), capped below the $75K level. ETH perpetual funding sits at −0.0024% per 8h (≈ &m

item.title: Gold at $5,500 ATH: Why Traders Are Moving to On-Chain Gold Perps (2026)
item.description: Gold hit $5,500/oz ATH as RWA perp volume surges 65,000% in Q1 2026. Compare gold perpetuals vs CFDs: overnight fees, custody, and how to trade gold on Hyperliquid 24/7 with near-zero holding costs.

item.title: Goldman Files Bitcoin Income ETF — $291M Exits Spot Funds the Same Day, BTC Doesn't Care
item.description: Goldman Sachs filed for a Bitcoin income ETF on April 14, generating yield by selling options on bitcoin-linked funds — following BlackRock's push into similar yield-focused products. On the same day, US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $291M in outflows, the largest single-day redemption since March 27. Despi

item.title: Central Banks Selling Gold Into the War Rally — Oil at $98 as Iran Deal Takes Shape. Two Long Trades Breaking.
item.description: Reports of EM central bank selling are emerging in the gold market — a reversal from three years of net buying. Meanwhile, US-Iran peace talks are gaining traction, pulling crude from ~$105 to $98 as the risk of Strait of Hormuz supply disruption eases. BTC holds above $74,590 with spot ETF inflows

item.title: Oil Perps Hit $2.4B Daily Volume — Trade the Hormuz Crisis On-Chain (2026)
item.description: Hyperliquid oil perps now trade more than Bitcoin. Learn how the Strait of Hormuz crisis created a $2.4B/day market and how to trade crude oil perpetuals 24/7 with zero overnight fees.

item.title: Iran Ceasefire Hopes Lift Markets — But HL Whales Aren't Buying It
item.description: Iran deal optimism sent BTC +4.75% to $74,386 and ETH +7.65% today, with S&P 500 and Nasdaq also rallying. TradFi institutions are net buyers on SPY. But Hyperliquid's top wallets haven't flipped — they were still net short $76.7M as of Apr 11. Either the whales get squeezed, or the rally fades.

item.title: BTC rallies 5% to $74K — but Hyperliquid whales are still net short $77M
item.description: Bitcoin surged +4.75% to $74,386 with ETH up 7.65% and HYPE up 7.69%. VIX collapsed from 30.61 to 19.12 (‑37.5% panic decay). But Hyperliquid S-tier wallets — the top 676 accounts by PnL — haven't flipped.

item.title: Gold Perps OI Surges Past $180M as Hormuz Tensions Escalate — Funding Stays Flat
item.description: Hyperliquid GOLD OI jumped to $182.3M with $41M daily volume, driven by Strait of Hormuz naval buildup headlines. But here's what the data says: funding rate is just 0.002%/8h — essentially zero. Longs aren't paying a premium despite the fear narrative.

item.title: ETH Funding Flips Negative for First Time in 3 Weeks — Shorts Paying Longs
item.description: ETH 8h funding rate turned -0.0042% on Hyperliquid, the first negative print since March 22. This means shorts are now paying longs to hold — a structural shift in positioning.

item.title: Why Trade Gold On-Chain? Perps vs ETFs vs COMEX — Fees, Leverage & 24/7 Access (2026)
item.description: Compare trading gold on-chain via perpetuals vs gold ETFs vs COMEX futures. Zero overnight fees, 24/7 access, up to 50x leverage, and self-custody. Complete cost breakdown for gold traders.

item.title: RWA Perps vs CFD Brokers: Overnight Fees, Custody & Why Traders Switch (2026)
item.description: RWA perpetuals vs CFD brokers compared: overnight fees (0% vs 5-10% annual), self-custody vs broker custody, 24/7 trading vs market hours. Real cost breakdown for gold, oil, and S&P 500 traders.

item.title: Hyperliquid Season 2 Airdrop — HLP 3x Multiplier & Dates (2026)
item.description: When is Hyperliquid Season 2? 238.8M HYPE allocated. HLP depositors get a 3x points multiplier. Eligibility criteria, snapshot dates, and farming strategies.

item.title: The Perp DEX Wars of 2026: Hyperliquid vs Lighter vs Aster Compared
item.description: Hyperliquid, Lighter, and Aster are battling for perp DEX dominance. Compare fees, speed, volume, and copy trading features — and see which platform wins for your trading style.

item.title: GMX v2 vs Hyperliquid: ETH Perp Liquidity Comparison (2026)
item.description: GMX v2 vs Hyperliquid liquidity depth for ETH perps — who wins in 2026? Side-by-side: fees, slippage, execution speed, leverage. dYdX included. Data-backed verdict.

item.title: What Is Copy Trading in Crypto? How It Works, Risks & Best Platforms (2026)
item.description: What is copy trading in crypto? Learn how it works, the real risks nobody mentions, and how DeFi copy trading on Hyperliquid eliminates the middleman. Beginner-friendly guide.

item.title: 7 Best Hyperliquid Trading Bots & Copy Trading Tools (2026)
item.description: Compare the best Hyperliquid trading bots and copy trading tools for 2026. Covers Hyperdash, Mizar, Coinrule, and more — with features, fees, and honest pros/cons.

item.title: Hyperliquid HLP Vault: 3x Airdrop Multiplier, APY & Risks (2026)
item.description: How HLP vaults work: deposit USDC, earn ~20% APY, get the 3x airdrop multiplier. 4-day lockup, 10% fee, and real risks explained before you deposit.

item.title: Market Regime Detection for Crypto: 5 Regimes Every Trader Must Know
item.description: Market regime detection classifies crypto markets into 5 states — Trending, Range-Bound, Transition, Compression, Crisis — so you use the right strategy at the right time.

item.title: How to Copy Trade on Hyperliquid: Best Platforms & Guide (2026)
item.description: The best Hyperliquid copy trading platforms in 2026, compared. Step-by-step guide to follow elite DeFi traders on-chain — no KYC, no middlemen.
